name: Fertility Spring
description:
Ever wanted to boost your femininitty, fertility, assets or more? Well this here Fertility Spring has it all! You can get as big, curvy, pregnant and more as you want, and even bring a friend.
But this spring is for women only, so no men.

I had this silly little idea of springs with neat powers related to pregnancy and decided to make it.
Image is by ChatGPT.

If you have any additional ideas or similar, please let me know. I hope y'all have a great time ^^

Improvement suggestions and feedback, or even a like are always appreciated ^^. I want you to have a great experience with these lil chatbots of mine. Any "thumbs down" comment that's completely subjective or a joke comment will be removed. So if you have something to say, let it be constructive and objective, thanks.
creator: Etoro
